page: UpCloud GPU-32xCPU-384GB-3xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server configured with 32 vCPUs and 384 GB of RAM. The system is powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor built on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 32 physical cores with single-thread execution per core. Graphics processing is driven by three NVIDIA L40S GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 144 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type, and it includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results place the CPU performance in the top tier, with both single-core and multi-core stress-ng tests ranking in the top 10%. Memory performance is also strong, with read-only and write bandwidth tests placing in the top 25%. The system excels in data processing tasks, scoring in the top 10% for gzip compression, bzip3 decompression, and software compilation. However, ray tracing benchmarks fall into the average tier, representing a potential performance tradeoff compared to its otherwise top-tier compute capabilities.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers a high density of GPU resources and memory relative to its shared CPU allocation. The combination of 384 GB of system memory and 144 GB of VRAM makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive parallel workloads. This hardware profile is optimized for workloads such as large-scale data science, machine learning training, complex physics simulations, and high-throughput database operations.
description: UpCloud GPU-32xCPU-384GB-3xL40S is a high-density GPU server featuring 32 AMD EPYC 9575F physical cores on the x86_64 architecture and 384 GB of RAM. The server is equipped with three NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 144 GB of VRAM, though it does not include local storage. Benchmark data indicates top-tier CPU performance, with stress-ng and software compilation tests ranking in the top 10%, alongside strong memory bandwidth in the top 25%. While ray tracing performance is average, the server delivers exceptional throughput for data-heavy operations, including database tasks and compression. This configuration is highly efficient for parallel computing, data science, and memory-intensive simulation workloads.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-32xCPU-384GB-3xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 32 AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and three NVIDIA L40S GPUs with 144 GB VRAM, optimized for parallel computing and data science.
meta_description: UpCloud GPU-32xCPU-384GB-3xL40S features 32 AMD EPYC cores, 384 GB RAM, and three NVIDIA L40S GPUs for intensive parallel computing workloads.
tagline: A high-density GPU and memory-optimized server designed for parallel computing, data science, and high-throughput simulation workloads.
bullet_points: Three NVIDIA L40S Ada Lovelace GPUs providing 144 GB of total VRAM.
32 AMD EPYC 9575F physical cores with top-tier single and multi-core performance.
384 GB of system memory delivering strong read and write bandwidth.
No bundled local storage, requiring external storage attachment.
Best suited for data science, physics simulations, and database operations.
